### Highlights | 更新内容

- 新增 Foundation Sunshine 双向剪贴板同步，当前支持 `文本` 与 `单张图片`。在 Moonlight 的 `设置 → 输入 → 剪贴板同步` 启用后，当前处于前台的串流窗口会自动接管剪贴板会话，并在主机与客户端之间同步可支持的内容。
  Added bidirectional clipboard sync for Foundation Sunshine, currently supporting `text` and `single-image` items. Once enabled in `Settings → Input → Clipboard Sync`, the foreground stream window automatically owns the clipboard session and syncs supported content between host and client.
- 修复了 `CoreHID` 输入监控权限状态的误判与重复打扰。对于已经授权过的系统，设置页与运行时状态现在会更接近真实可用状态，不再那么容易反复提示授权或错误回退。
  Fixed incorrect `CoreHID` Input Monitoring state detection and repeated permission prompts. On systems that were already granted access, the settings UI and runtime path now stay closer to the real usable state instead of repeatedly re-prompting or falling back incorrectly.
- 修复了 `AWDL Stability Helper` 已安装后仍被误判为未就绪的问题。Moonlight 现在会更准确地区分持久化 Helper、launchd 已加载状态与一次性管理员回退路径，减少每次启动都再次申请授权的情况。
  Fixed the case where the `AWDL Stability Helper` could already be installed but still appear as not ready. Moonlight now distinguishes the persistent helper, loaded launchd state, and one-shot administrator fallback more accurately, reducing repeated authorization requests on every launch.
- 继续修复 `CoreHID` 自由鼠标模式下的边缘交互体验。离屏切换、回到串流窗口、右侧悬浮球命中和边缘重新接管现在更接近 `1.3.5 / 1.3.6` 的已知正常手感。
  Continued refining edge interaction in `CoreHID` free-mouse mode. Leaving the stream, re-entering it, hitting the right-side floating control, and edge re-capture now behave much closer to the known-good feel from `1.3.5 / 1.3.6`.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- README 已补充 Foundation Sunshine 双向剪贴板能力说明，方便用户直接理解当前支持范围与使用入口。
  The README now documents the Foundation Sunshine clipboard feature so users can understand the current scope and where to enable it.
- 版本号已更新到 `1.3.8`，并补充了这一版的专用 release notes，方便继续沿用现有发布流程生成 GitHub Release 页面内容。
  The marketing version has been updated to `1.3.8`, and this release now includes dedicated curated release notes so the existing release workflow can generate the GitHub Release page cleanly.
